title: WoW Lua LS Configuration
description: Configuration file for the WoW Lua Language Server (.wowluarc.json)

$schema.description: Path or URL to the JSON Schema for editor support.

addon_root.description: Marks this directory as a separate addon root. In multi-addon workspaces, each addon root gets its own isolated addon namespace table (local _, ns = ...), so fields defined in one addon aren't visible in another. Lua globals remain shared.

ignore.description: Path prefixes to exclude from scanning. Relative to this config file's directory. Supports glob wildcards: * (any characters within a path component), ? (single character), ** (any number of directory levels).

library.description: Paths to scan for types but suppress diagnostics. Useful for third-party libraries where you want type information but can't fix diagnostic issues. Relative entries use the same pattern syntax as ignore. Absolute paths are also supported for libraries outside the workspace.

framexml.description: Whether FrameXML API globals are available. Set to false to treat FrameXML-specific globals as undefined.

flavors.description: WoW flavor names the project targets. Enables the wrong-flavor-api diagnostic when non-empty. 'mainline' is an alias for 'retail'.

globals.description: Control which global variables are allowed without diagnostics.

read.description: Global names that may be accessed without triggering undefined-global. Supports glob wildcards: * and ?. SavedVariables from .toc files are automatically included.

write.description: Global names that may be created/assigned without triggering create-global. Supports glob wildcards: * and ?. SavedVariables from .toc files are automatically included.

allow_slash_commands.description: Automatically treat globals matching SLASH_* as allowed read/write globals. Set to false to require explicit listing.

allow_binding_globals.description: Automatically treat globals matching BINDING_HEADER_* and BINDING_NAME_* as allowed read/write globals. Set to false to require explicit listing.

backward_param_types.description: Infer parameter types from body usage (arithmetic, concatenation, typed-function argument calls).

correlated_return_overloads.description: Infer correlated return patterns (all-set-or-all-nil) for automatic sibling narrowing.

implicit_protected_prefix.description: Treat runtime-discovered data fields starting with _ as implicitly @protected. Does not affect explicit @field declarations or methods.

enable.description: Master switch for all inlay hints. When false, no inlay hints are shown regardless of individual category settings.

parameterNames.description: Show parameter name hints at call sites. Suppressed when the argument text already matches the parameter name.

variableTypes.description: Show inferred type hints on local variable declarations without explicit @type. Suppressed for nil, any, and function-valued variables.

functionReturnTypes.description: Show inferred return type hints on function definitions without @return annotation.

forVariableTypes.description: Show inferred type hints on for...in loop variables.

parameterTypes.description: Show inferred type hints on function parameters without @param annotation. Suppressed for self, any, and nil parameters.

chainedReturnTypes.description: Show intermediate return type hints in method chains. Suppressed when the return type is any, nil, or ?.

enable.description: Master switch for all code lenses. When false, no code lenses are shown regardless of individual category settings.

references.description: Show 'N usages' lenses on function definitions.

overrides.description: Show 'overrides Parent' lenses on methods that override a parent class method.

plugins.description: Paths to Lua diagnostic plugin scripts. Relative to this config file's directory. Plugins can query analysis results and emit custom diagnostics.

editor.description: Control editor behavior for on-type actions.

autoInsertEnd.description: Automatically insert end/until when Enter is pressed after a block-opening keyword (if…then, while…do, function, repeat). Set to false to disable.

snippets.description: Emit snippet completions (e.g. parameter placeholders and annotation tag bodies). Set to false to disable all snippet completions.

callSnippets.description: Auto-fill a function's parameters (e.g. foo(${1:a}, ${2:b})) when completing a function name. Set to false to insert just the function name. Independent of completion.snippets.

enable.description: Diagnostic codes to enable. Used for default-off diagnostics (need-check-nil, nil-index, implicit-nil-return, invalid-op, unused-vararg, incomplete-signature-doc, redundant-or, redundant-and, unknown-*-type) or to override a parent config's disable list.

severity.description: Override the severity level for specific diagnostic codes.
